name: Oven Fries with Garlic and Parmesan Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Parmigiano Reggiano cheese; freshly grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut them lengthwise into quarters. Place in cold water to cover. Drain the potatoes and blot dry with paper towels.
2. Heat the olive oil in a shallow roasting pan over medium-high heat. When hot, add the potatoes in a single layer without crowding them too much. Brown on one side for about 9 minutes total. Remove from heat. This step can be done several hours in advance and kept at room temperature until ready to finish.
3. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C). Set the rack in the middle of the oven. Place the potatoes in the pan in the hot oven.
Bake until tender, about 25 minutes. Use tongs to turn them once midway. Just before removing from the oven, toss with garlic, red pepper flakes, and cheese. Return to the oven for a few minutes until the cheese melts and the garlic is fragrant.
